snippet.title: ST MAN - KALI KALI FT. YUNG 22 & BIG NORZZA ( OFFICAL MUSIC VIDEO )
snippet.description:
Nepal Hiphop Records Presents the official music video of Kali Kali by ST MAN featuring Yung 22 & Big Norzza.
Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.


Audio Credits :
вЮЯ Performed By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
вЮЯ Music Produced By - St Man
вЮЯ Background scoring - St Man
вЮЯ Lyrics By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
вЮЯ Female singer - Somea Baraili
вЮЯ Composed By - St Man & Yung 22
вЮЯ Sarangi - Hemanta Kancha Rasaily
вЮЯ Mix & Master By 8ugustus

Video Credits : Matte studio
вЮЯ Director : Thomas GM 
вЮЯ DOP : nexal thapa 
вЮЯ Edit: thomas gm / nexal thapa
вЮЯ 1st Assistant Camera : Pratik thapa
вЮЯ color: thomas gm
вЮЯ BTS : Arjun
вЮЯ Lights  : Nabin bogati 
вЮЯ Visual concept : ST MAN & Thomas GM
 
 
Project Management  :
 
вЮЯ Artist and Project management: Knack Nepal
вЮЯ Project Head: Niraj Baraili
вЮЯ Production Manager : Ashok Ayer 
вЮЯ Flyer & design - Bipshon Design
вЮЯ Stylist / Costume Designer : Tsabinz
вЮЯ Makeup & Hair : Sangita Tamang, Annie Tamang 

Cast
вЮЯ Actor: Ram Chandra Adhikari Aka Gokte Kaji
вЮЯ Model :  Sharon Lepcha Bajracharya & Smriti Tamang

Choreographed by Baigaicha Crew.


Special Thanks to
Yung 22, Big Norzza, BIg Man, Fumu, Carey dai, Sameer dai, Ashok Dai

Subscribe and click the bell icon to get notified.    / @stmanofficial  

Follow me on :
Instagram :   / https://www.instagram.com/stman.official?
Facebook :   /  https://www.facebook.com/share/1DoxDxiBBK/?

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2

Lai bari Lai 
Lai bari Lai 
Maya cha hai dil bhari nai 
Banai khayo dadelo le 
Manai Khayo timro maya le 


Hamro Bhetghat Pahilo Choti Ho ( lhasso )
Bhana Aja kahi katai Jane Ho ( lhasso )
Kusume Rumal Chino Laijau ( Saachai )
Yespali Lane Gari rachu Dai ma ta


Dada Kada Katera Ma sangai Jauna tmi 
Timro mana samma jane bato Dekhaideuna hai 
Maya Tarki farki jharki bhayeni Boli deuna hai

Khelna Deu 
Herna Deu 
Salkeko jawani Fakreko Maya maa Palkeko ma pani 
Cha maya cha katai 
Sirfula Siraima Laidium ki chhapakai


Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2



Mutu Dhak Dhak BP high Body maa Heat 
Chinta Nagara ma Gardimla thik
ausadhi lekhdya chu 7 din ko 
Khop lagai dinchu 7 inch ko 

Dr. St Man Bhaye Kina attina paryo 
Bihana ki diuso ki Rat dina paryo 
Dina maa 5 ki 7 ki 8 Dina paryo 
Vana Body ko kun Part jach dina paryo 

Big House Big Dream Big chain Big Thing 
Living Fast Chasing Dream Lifestyle mainstream 
Deko haina guff 
Maya vanda Badhi Garchau Business Talk 
She don't believe in love tara chaiyo mero love 
Yeah

Aare Aare Aare Aare 
Aare Apango 
Aale Aale Aale Aale 
Aale Apango 
Nga Mula Ela semri taa Mula Ngada Tha mula 
Maya La Mula Chyago 

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Janti boki aula 10 gate bihibar 
Gaubhari masu ra bhat 
Kodo Ko Raksi chyang Nigar Bidi cigar
K khane K piune afno bichar 
Malai daijo maa maya  chaiyo ajambari 
Meri Sakambari timlai samhali  rakchu rakam sari
Ful chari diula timro harek kadam pachi 
Siudo maa timro mang bharidinchu 
9 biga bari timro nam garidinchu 
9 mahina maa ghorle paune kam gardinchu
5 biga garib lai daan garidinchu 

Hooo Hooo Hooo 

Haa

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe


Fulaiko Fulbari maa 
fulai lw Sajaidiula 
Appa Ra Aame le Mane ta 
Aune Saal Bhagai diula 
Pardaina Aatina 
Bichaima Chaddina 
Tayar chu Sath dina 
Hapta ko Sath dina 
Lhassooooo

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Female 

Chadi malai Najau etai 
malai laijau timi sangai 
X2

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh DвАЩSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
DirectorвАЩs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.description:
The GRAND FINALS of BGIS 2026 are here.

No more second chances. No more fallback stages.
This is where the trophy is decided.

After months of competition, the final teams stand ready to battle for the championship title and the ultimate prize. Every drop, every rotation, every fight now carries legacy weight.

One stage. One champion.

Watch the GRAND FINALS live and witness the conclusion of BGIS 2026.

snippet.title: Sheesha (Official Music Video) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Sorab Bedi | Niharika Tiwari
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened. The real вАЬowners of the songвАЭ have all assembled together! Watch Sorab Bedi and Niharika Tiwari join Mitta Ror for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song Sheesha.

Audio Credits:
Performed by Mitta Ror, Swara Verma
Written and Composed by Mitta Ror
Music Production by Yeah Ishwar

Video Credits:
Starring Sorab Bedi, Niharika Tiwari & Mitta Ror
Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer 
1st Ad - Jass
Dop - Munish Shunty
Editor - CutsbyNav ( Navraj)
Colorist - Mr Luv
Production- Kainth Production ( Gagan)
Choreographer- Amit syal
Jib - Sonu
Makeup - Guru and Team
Hair - Sahil ( Barber king )
Art director - Kaka Art
Costume- Rajat Manchanda
Camera - cenidream
Focus puller - Gaggu
Editor - Cuts By Nav
VFX  - Rahul (the.vfx.wala)
BTS - J Singh & Ashu Dadwal
USA production: 
Front Line Production @spicegridproductions @gigipanwar
Assistant DOP @stablefilms

Lyrics:

Teri Aage Peechhe Laage
Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove
Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke
Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale
Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jib Te Re Pakda
yo Hath Tanne Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To
Ghabrandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit
Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein
Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyaar Aale Gaane Main To
Gaan Laagi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala
Bhoot Mere Pe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe
Landi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Manne Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh
Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera
Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Doob Gaya Main Billi Billi
Aankhya Mein Bairan
Teri Hansi Ke Hansi
Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe
Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Mein
Pair bhi na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe

Tu Fursat Te Ghadi

Hoth Tere Laal
Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid

Teri Gel Deun Gaane
Main Sync Meri Jaan

ho Aankhya Aalya Maarya
Tanne Teer Chhore Re
Mere Dil Ne yu Gaya
Jama Cheer Chhore Re
ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe
Manne Kuch Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage
Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re
Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Mein
Dive Makha Landi Phiru Su

snippet.title: The Furious (2026) Official Trailer - Xie Miao, Joe Taslim
snippet.description:
The Furious - Watch the trailer now! In Theaters on May 29. Starring Xie Miao, Joe Taslim, and Yang Enyou. Co-starring Brian Le, Joey Iwanaga, Sahajak Boonthanakit, Manatsanun Phanlerdwongsakul, Guo Junqing, and Winai Wiangyangkung. Special appearances by Yayan Ruhian and Jija Yanin. Directed by Kenji Tanigaki.

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE: YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.lionsgate.com/movies/
https://www.facebook.com/lionsgate
https://twitter.com/lionsgate
https://www.instagram.com/lionsgate/
https://www.tiktok.com/@lionsgate

#TheFurious

After the daughter of Wang Wei (Xie Miao) is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out on a rampage to find her himself. His only ally is Navin (Joe Taslim) вАУ a relentless journalist whose wife has mysteriously disappeared. Fueled by a furious vengeance, the unlikely duo ruthlessly fights against the kidnappers in this explosive martial arts showdown.

вАЬTimi HoвАЭ  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

вАЬTimi HoвАЭ is now streaming on all platforms.

рЯО§ Lyrics: Banjaare - Bairan

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–µ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–µin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

.........

.........

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

snippet.title: ROBLOX BECOME A LUCKY BLOCK..
snippet.description:
Today I became a lucky block in roblox. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

id.title: ROBLOX MENJADI BLOK KEBERUNTUNGAN..

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. Keunikannya terletak pada hampir semua hal di ROBLOX dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX вАФ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun вАФ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)

Stream & Download: https://lauv.lnk.to/me...

Lets Support & Follow Lauv:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/lauvsongs
Twitter: https://www.x.com/lauvsongs
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lauvsongs
Instagram: https://www.unstagram.com/lauvsongs



#ILikeMeBetter #Lauv #Pop #Lyrics #TikTokHymn

Lyrics:
 Lauv 
"I Like Me Better"

To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burning through the hours talking

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you, swear the room yeah it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking
I might have to tell you something

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Stay awhile stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me
Yeah, yeah

I like me better when I'm with you
(Yes, I do, yes, I do, babe)
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I like me, I like me
Look who you made me, made me, oh no
Better when

I like me better when I'm with you

Things got heated in Indian Theft Simulator today! When Nobita refused to share his favorite excavator, ShinchanвАЩs legendary temper took over. In a moment of pure rage, Shinchan smashed the excavator to pieces! рЯШ±
Nobita, heartbroken and in tears, ran to get Bhabhi. After a heavy scolding and even getting kicked out of the house, Shinchan was about to leave... until Jack Bhaiya made his grand entry! рЯШО
Watch how Jack Bhaiya fixes the brotherly bond by taking them both to the toy showroom. Will a brand-new Realistic Oil Tanker for Shinchan and a shiny Auto-Rickshaw for Nobita finally bring peace? Or is this just the beginning of a new prank?
Watch till the end to see their reaction! рЯОђ

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith keвА¶
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith keвА¶. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke вА¶. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath keвА¶
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

вЦЇ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. KripaвАЩs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Dil Aaya - Aviverse | вА™вА™ @astheticavi  |вА™вА™ @MeAbhishekShukla   (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
STREAM All Songs Of  Aviverse : https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someoneвАЩs beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Audio Credits:

Song Name : Dil Aaya
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Music Producer : Abs

Video Credits:
 
Cast:  Tanvi Duggal , Janhavi Joshi , Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Director: Joseph B. 
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Cinematographer : Vasu Menon 
Assistant Cinematographer : Archit
Line Producer: Shravan
Editor: Ajmal Rasali
Colorist: Ajmal Rasali
Poster & Thumbnail Designer: Junaid & Shreyas


Stream On Aviverse Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

Aviverse's Instagram -      / aviversemusic    
Abhishek's Instagram -       / abhishekxavi    
Avinash's Instagram -         / aesthetic_avii    

Lyrics  :  

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Haath pakad ke sang chal de tu

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Kinni soni hai, mainu lagti tu

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Jaati hai tham ab saansein meri
Jab aati tu paas mere

Ghayal karta hai tera woh kajal mujhe
Jab takti ye akhiyan tujhe

Dulhan banaunga, tujhko sajaunga
Mehndi laga ke rakhna, doli mein launga

Jo na maane ye duniya, toh ladd bhi jaunga
Haathon ko thaam le, main waada nibhaunga

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

(c) Aviverse 2026

snippet.title: Searching for 100 Players Who Went Missing
snippet.description:
Thousands of players have joined the Unstable SMP, but a small portion of those players have mysteriously disappeared, including my best friend. After finding out no one else was willing to solve this, I along with my teammate, JumperWho, made it our mission to find the missing players and hopefully reunite with my long lost friend...

Searching for 100 Players Who Went Missing


Unstable SMP Members
вЮЬ @wemmbumc 
вЮЬ @FlameFragsMC 
вЮЬ @ParrotX2 
вЮЬ @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

music: 
Christopher Larkin
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell
Cameron 'Caero' Munoz
Johan Johnson
Peter Hont
Crispin Hands

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

written, recorded, & edited by spoke

а§®а§Ња§Ѓ а§Ьа§™а•Ва§В а§®а§ња§Єа§њ а§µа§Ња§Єа§∞ а§§а•За§∞а§Њ а§єа•А  а§≠а§Ха•На§§а§њ а§¶а•З а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§≠а•На§∞а§Ѓ а§Ђа§Ва§¶ а§Ыа•Ба§°а§Ља§Ња§Уа•§а•§

а§ґа•На§∞а•Аа§Іа§∞ а§Єа§Њ а§Еа§®а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Ч а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§єа•И  а§ѓа•З а§Єа•Ла§Ъа§Ха•З а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Њ а§Ьа•А а§Ыа•Ла•Ь а§® а§¶а•За§®а§Ња•§
а§®а§Ња§§а§Њ а§Еа§Яа•Ва§Я а§єа•И а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§Фа§∞ а§ђа•За§Яа•З а§Ха§Њ  а§®а§Ња§§а§Њ а§ѓа•З а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Њ а§Ьа•А а§§а•Ла•Ь а§® а§¶а•За§®а§Ња•§а•§
а§Іа•На§ѓа§Ња§®а•В а§Єа§Њ а§Іа•На§ѓа§Ња§® а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§Ха§∞ а§™а§Ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ѓа•Иа§В  а§єа•Ва§В а§≠а§Яа§Ха§Њ а§Ѓа•Ба§Ва§є а§Ѓа•Ла•Ь а§® а§≤а•За§®а§Ња•§
а§Ьа•Иа§Єа•З а§≠а•А а§єа•Ва§В а§Еа§ђ а§¶а§Ња§Є а§єа•Ва§В а§§а•За§∞а§Њ а§Ѓа•Иа§В а§Жа§Є а§Ха•А а§™а•Ла§Яа§≤а§њ а§Ђа•Ла•Ь а§® а§¶а•За§®а§Ња•§а•§

а§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ а§Ѓа•За§В а§®а§ња§§а•На§ѓ а§Ъа•Эа•З а§Ъа§∞а§£а•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ьа•Л  а§Ђа•Ва§≤ а§ђа§®а§Ња§¶а•Л а§Ѓа•Ба§Эа•З а§µа•Л а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§
а§¶а•Га§Ја•На§Яа§њ а§Ха§∞а•Л а§Еа§™а§®а•З а§За§Є а§¶а§Ња§Є а§™а•З  а§Ъа§Ња§єа§§а§Њ а§єа•Ва§В а§Ъа§∞а§£а•Ла§В а§Ха•А а§Ѓа•Иа§В а§Ыа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§а•§
а§Жа§Ь а§Ђа§Ва§Єа§Њ а§Ѓа§Эа§Іа§Ња§∞ а§Ѓа•За§В а§єа•Ва§В а§Ѓа•Иа§В  а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§Жа§Ха•З а§®а§ња§Ха§Ња§≤а•Л а§Ѓа•За§∞а•А а§Еа§ђ а§®а•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§
а§∞а§Ха•На§Ја§Њ а§Ха§∞а•Л а§ґа§∞а§£а§Ња§Ча§§ а§Ха•А  а§Єа§∞а•На§µа•За§ґа•На§µа§∞а•А а§¶а•Аа§® а§Ха•А а§≤а§Ња§Ь а§ђа§Ъа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§а•§

а§єа•З а§Ьа§Ча§§а§Ња§∞а§ња§£а§њ а§ґа•Ла§Ха§®а§ња§µа§Ња§∞а§ња§£а§њ-а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§¶а•Ба§∞а•На§Ча§Њ а§≠а§Ьа§®

а§єа•З а§Ьа§Ча§§а§Ња§∞а§ња§£а§њ а§ґа•Ла§Ха§®а§ња§µа§Ња§∞а§ња§£а§њ  а§Єа§ња§Ва§є а§Єа§µа§Ња§∞а•А а§Ха•Л а§Єа§Ња§Ьа§Ха•З а§Жа§Уа•§
а§ґа•На§∞а§¶а•На§Іа§Њ а§Ха§Њ а§™а•Ба§Ја•На§™ а§ђа§ња§Ыа§Њ а§єа•И а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§∞а§Ња§є а§Ѓа•За§В  а§Єа•За§µа§Њ а§Ха•Л а§Ѓа•За§∞а•З а§Єа•Ма§≠а§Ња§Ча•На§ѓ а§ђа§®а§Ња§Уа•§а•§
а§єа•И а§∞а•Ва§Ца§Њ а§Єа•Ва§Ца§Њ а§Ьа•Л а§™а•Ба§§а•На§∞ а§Ха•З а§єа§Ња§• а§Ѓа•За§В  а§™а•На§∞а•За§Ѓ а§Єа•З а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§Йа§Єа•З а§≠а•Ла§Ч а§≤а§Ча§Ња§Уа•§
а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§Єа•З а§єа•Иа§В а§®а•Иа§® а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§¶а§∞а•На§ґ а§Ха•Л а§§а•За§∞а•З  а§Ха•Га§™а§Њ а§Ха•А а§Ыа§µа•А а§Па§Х а§ђа§Ња§∞ а§¶а§ња§Ца§Ња§Уа•§а•§

а§∞а•Ва§™ а§Еа§®а•За§Х а§єа•Иа§В а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Њ а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа§Ња§∞а•З  а§¶а•Ба§∞а•На§Ча§Њ а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа•Аа§В а§Фа§∞ а§єа•Л а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа•Аа§В а§Ха§Ња§≤а•Аа•§
а§¶а§Ха•На§Ја§Єа•Ба§§а§Њ а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа•Аа§В а§ґа§Ва§≠а•Ба§™а•На§∞а§ња§ѓа§Њ а§Єа§§а•А  а§єа•Л а§§а•Ба§Ѓ а§єа•А а§Ьа§Ч а§Ха•А а§∞а§Ца§µа§Ња§≤а•Аа•§а•§
а§Эа•Ла§≤а•А а§Ђа•Иа§≤а§Ња§Ха•З а§Ьа•Л а§Жа§ѓа§Њ а§єа•И а§¶а•На§µа§Ња§∞ а§™а•З  а§≠а§Ха•На§§ а§µа•Л а§Ѓа§Ња§§ а§Ча§ѓа§Њ а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§Ца§Ња§≤а•Аа•§
а§Іа§∞а•На§Ѓ а§Ха•А а§Ьа•На§ѓа•Ла§§а§њ а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа•Аа§В а§Єа•З а§™а•На§∞а§Ха§Ња§ґа§ња§§  а§Ха•Ла§Яа§њ а§™а•На§∞а§£а§Ња§Ѓ а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа•За§В а§Ьа•Ла§§а§Ња§µа§Ња§≤а•Аа•§а•§

а§™а§Ња§Яа§® а§Ха•А а§§а•Ба§Ѓ а§єа•А а§єа•Л а§™а§Ња§Яа•За§ґа•На§µа§∞а•А  а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§ґа•Аа§§а§≤а§Њ а§§а•Ба§Ѓ а§¶а§Ва§§ а§Ха•Ба§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•Аа•§
а§Ъа§ња§Ва§§а§Ња§®а§ња§µа§Ња§∞а§ња§£а§њ а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§Ъа§ња§Ва§§а§™а•Ва§∞а•На§£а•А а§єа•Л  а§¶а•За§µа•А а§Ѓа§®а§Єа§Њ а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Њ а§µа•Иа§Ја•На§£а•Л а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞а•Аа•§а•§
а§Єа§ђ а§ґа§Ха•На§§а§ња§™а•Аа§†а•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§ґа§Ха•На§§а§њ а§єа•И а§Па§Х а§єа•А  а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§Еа§¶а•На§≠а•Ба§§ а§ђа§°а§Ља•А а§≤а•Аа§≤а§Њ а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа§Ња§∞а•Аа•§
а§¶а•За§µ а§§а•На§∞а§ња§¶а•За§µ а§Ха§∞а•За§В а§Ьа§ѓа§Ха§Ња§∞ а§Єа•Ба§®а•Л а§µа§ња§®а§§а•А а§Ьа§Ча§¶а§Ва§ђ а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•Аа•§а•§

а§єа•З а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§¶а•За§µа•А а§§а•Ба§Ѓа•На§єа§Ња§∞а•З а§єа•А а§§а•За§Ь а§Єа•З  а§Єа•Ва§∞а•На§ѓ а§ґа§ґа•А а§Єа§ђ а§§а•За§Ь а§єа•Иа§В а§™а§Ња§§а•За•§
а§Єа§Ња§Ча§∞ а§™а§Ца§Ња§∞а§Ха•З а§єа•З а§Еа§Ва§ђа§ња§Ха§Њ  а§єа•Иа§В а§Ѓа§® а§Ѓа•За§В а§Еа§§а§ња§ґа§ѓ а§єа§∞а•На§Ја§Ња§§а•За•§а•§
а§§а•Ба§Ѓ а§єа§Ва§Єа§Ха•З а§Ьа§ђ а§¶а•За§Ца§§а•А а§єа•Л а§§а•Л а§Єа•Ва§Ца•З а§єа•Ба§П а§Ча•Ба§≤ а§≠а•А а§Ца§ња§≤ а§Ьа§Ња§§а•За•§
а§ґа•За§Ј а§Єа§єа§Єа•На§∞ а§Ѓа•Ба§Ца•Ла§В а§Єа•З а§Ха§єа•За§В а§ѓа§ґ а§µа•За§¶ а§§а•Л а§≠а§Ња§µ а§Єа•З а§ґа•Аа§ґ а§Эа•Ба§Ха§Ња§§а•За•§а•§

а§Ѓа§Ва§Ча§≤а§Ха§Ња§∞а§ња§£а§њ а§Єа§Ва§Ха§Яа§єа§Ња§∞а§ња§£а§њ  а§™а§Ња§™ а§™а§ња§ґа§Ња§Ъ а§Ха•Л а§Ѓа§Ња§∞ а§≠а§Ча§Ња§Уа•§
а§Ьа•Иа§Єа•З а§Ѓа§ња§Яа§Ња§§а•А а§єа•Л а§¶а•Ба§Ја•На§Я а§Ьа§®а•Ла§В а§Ха•Л а§Ѓа§Ња§В  а§µа•Иа§Єа•З а§Ѓа•За§∞а•З а§¶а•Ба§Га§Ц а§¶а•Ла§Ј а§Ѓа§ња§Яа§Ња§Уа•§а•§
а§Єа§ња§¶а•На§Іа§ња§ѓа•Ла§В а§Ха•А а§єа•Л а§≠а§£а•На§°а§Ња§∞ а§≠а§µа§Ња§®а•А  а§Ѓа•За§∞а•З а§ђа§ња§Ча•Ьа•З а§Єа§ђ а§Ха§Ња§Ь а§ђа§®а§Ња§Уа•§
а§®а§Ња§Ѓ а§Ьа§™а•Ва§В а§®а§ња§Єа§њ а§µа§Ња§Єа§∞ а§§а•За§∞а§Њ а§єа•А  а§≠а§Ха•На§§а§њ а§¶а•З а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§≠а•На§∞а§Ѓ а§Ђа§Ва§¶ а§Ыа•Ба§°а§Ља§Ња§Уа•§а•§

а§ґа•На§∞а•Аа§Іа§∞ а§Єа§Њ а§Еа§®а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Ч а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§єа•И  а§ѓа•З а§Єа•Ла§Ъа§Ха•З а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Њ а§Ьа•А а§Ыа•Ла•Ь а§® а§¶а•За§®а§Ња•§
а§®а§Ња§§а§Њ а§Еа§Яа•Ва§Я а§єа•И а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§Фа§∞ а§ђа•За§Яа•З а§Ха§Њ  а§®а§Ња§§а§Њ а§ѓа•З а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Њ а§Ьа•А а§§а•Ла•Ь а§® а§¶а•За§®а§Ња•§а•§
а§Іа•На§ѓа§Ња§®а•В а§Єа§Њ а§Іа•На§ѓа§Ња§® а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§Ха§∞ а§™а§Ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ѓа•Иа§В  а§єа•Ва§В а§≠а§Яа§Ха§Њ а§Ѓа•Ба§Ва§є а§Ѓа•Ла•Ь а§® а§≤а•За§®а§Ња•§
а§Ьа•Иа§Єа•З а§≠а•А а§єа•Ва§В а§Еа§ђ а§¶а§Ња§Є а§єа•Ва§В а§§а•За§∞а§Њ а§Ѓа•Иа§В а§Жа§Є а§Ха•А а§™а•Ла§Яа§≤а§њ а§Ђа•Ла•Ь а§® а§¶а•За§®а§Ња•§а•§

а§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ а§Ѓа•За§В а§®а§ња§§а•На§ѓ а§Ъа•Эа•З а§Ъа§∞а§£а•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ьа•Л  а§Ђа•Ва§≤ а§ђа§®а§Ња§¶а•Л а§Ѓа•Ба§Эа•З а§µа•Л а§Ѓа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§
а§¶а•Га§Ја•На§Яа§њ а§Ха§∞а•Л а§Еа§™а§®а•З а§За§Є а§¶а§Ња§Є а§™а•З  а§Ъа§Ња§єа§§а§Њ а§єа•Ва§В а§Ъа§∞а§£а•Ла§В а§Ха•А а§Ѓа•Иа§В а§Ыа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§а•§
а§Жа§Ь а§Ђа§Ва§Єа§Њ а§Ѓа§Эа§Іа§Ња§∞ а§Ѓа•За§В а§єа•Ва§В а§Ѓа•Иа§В  а§Ѓа§Ња§В а§Жа§Ха•З а§®а§ња§Ха§Ња§≤а•Л а§Ѓа•За§∞а•А а§Еа§ђ а§®а•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§
а§∞а§Ха•На§Ја§Њ а§Ха§∞а•Л а§ґа§∞а§£а§Ња§Ча§§ а§Ха•А  а§Єа§∞а•На§µа•За§ґа•На§µа§∞а•А а§¶а•Аа§® а§Ха•А а§≤а§Ња§Ь а§ђа§Ъа•Иа§ѓа•На§ѓа§Ња•§а•§

snippet.title: Spending $9,482,683 For The Most OVERPOWERED TRACTOR In Roblox..
snippet.description:
Today I built a tractor in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX вАФ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun вАФ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.
